name: plan012-code-block-redesign
description: Claude Design Round 2 mockup 의 .code-card / .code-content / .term-block 패턴 적용 — rehype-highlight → rehype-pretty-code (shiki dual theme github-dark/light) 마이그레이션 + filename header (title=...) + line numbers + copy button (CodeCard client wrapper) + line-highlight ({3-5,7}) + diff/terminal variants. plan011 (article page) 머지 후 진행. mermaid pre 는 skip 처리.

phases.title: rehype-pretty-code 마이그레이션 + CodeCard + 코드블록 frame 토큰 + 기존 글 syntax 검증
